basic_details.job_title: NIT Agartala Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Assistant/ JRF/ SRF/ RA Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Agartala (NIT Agartala) JRF/PA Notification 2026 has been released on 01 July 2026 on the official website https://www.nita.ac.in/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Agartala JRF/PA Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Chemistry or equivalent, Preferentially CSIR-UGC NET including Lectureship and/or GATE qualified
qualification.details: Preferentially CSIR-UGC NET/GATE qualified scholars with M.Sc. in Chemistry or equivalent degree.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- with 10% HRA or Rs. 30,000/- with 10% HRA per month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nita.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NIT Agartala JRF/PA Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Agartala JRF/PA Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.national_institute_of_technology_agartal: M.Sc. in Chemistry or equivalent, Preferentially CSIR-UGC NET including Lectureship and/or GATE qualified

content_sections.heading: NIT Agartala JRF/PA Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Agartala Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Agartala JRF/PA Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Agartala JRF/PA Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Preferentially CSIR-UGC NET/GATE qualified scholars with M.Sc. in Chemistry or equivalent degree.

content_sections.heading: NIT Agartala JRF/PA Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Rs. 37,000/- with 10% HRA or Rs. 30,000/- with 10% HRA per month

content_sections.heading: NIT Agartala JRF/PA Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NIT Agartala JRF/PA Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.nita.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Agartala JRF/PA Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Agartala JRF/PA recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the NIT Agartala JRF/PA recruitment is 27th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Junior Research Fellow (JRF) / Project Assistant (PA).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF/PA post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.Sc. in Chemistry or an equivalent degree. Preference will be given to those who are CSIR-UGC NET including Lectureship and/or GATE qualified.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF/PA position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 37,000/- with 10% HRA or Rs. 30,000/- with 10% HRA per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the JRF/PA post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the JRF/PA post?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on an interview, which may be conducted in a hybrid mode.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of NIT Agartala, www.nita.ac.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is F.NITA/15 (7-CHEM)/ANRF Project/Scholar/A. Saha/2025-2026.
